# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
data:
  linkerd.yaml: |
    apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
    kind: ServiceMesh
    metadata:
      name: default
    spec:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: default
      linkerdNamespace: linkerd
      enableAutoInjection: true
      server:
        port: 8443
        tls:
          enabled: true
          crt: /path/to/crt.crt
          key: /path/to/key.key
      authorizationPolicy:
        mode: STRICT
        policy:
          - action: ALLOW
            services:
              - name: service1
              - name: service2
          - action: DENY
            services:
              - name: service3
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-deployment
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-container
          image: my-image
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-service1-service2
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  services:
    - name: service1
    - name: service2
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-service3
spec:
  action: DENY
  services:
    - name: service3
```
